body.title: [awaiting_validation] Build-log digester — inference-free minion that keeps build state pick-up-ready
body.description:
Inference-free daemon that tails datacenter_logs and maintains a compact, ticket-keyed build digest so a context resuming mid-build reads a small digest instead of re-tokenizing raw logs. Highest-value content is the attempt-to-outcome timeline + current blocker (the anti-loop fuel: stops a resuming context from re-trying an already-failed approach). Doubles as the narrative build story (observability). Helps BOTH the rewind path and the compact path. Key it by ticket id so the build digest (qualitative) and per-ticket-usage-metrics (quantitative) are the same row.

Ground-Loop supervised, symmetric with web_server. First instance of the 'active-maintenance store' class from D-rewind-as-workflow-primitive (workstream 3).

**PRECONDITION (advisor):** 'inference-free' holds only if logs carry structured attempt/outcome boundary markers. Raw events (test pass/fail, file touched) parse cleanly, but grouping events into attempt->outcome needs the log lines to mark those boundaries. This ticket may need a companion structured-build-event logging upgrade (AR-009 already logs state changes — confirm the markers exist); otherwise the digester degrades to a flat event timeline. Do NOT let 'inference-free' silently smuggle in a logging-format change — scope it explicitly.

**Affected files:** TBD — discovery step in sprint (new daemon under devices/, a Ground Loop descriptor under config/ground_loop/, log-parsing module; check datacenter_logs/ AR-009 line format first).
**Design rules:** no-sqlite (Postgres or flat-file for the digest store), test-plan-or-why-not, external-state-principle (digest held externally, keyed by ticket id), AR-009 (the digester reads AR-009 logs; may need to extend their structure).
**Scope boundary:** IN — tail+parse build logs into a ticket-keyed digest (attempt/outcome timeline + current blocker), Ground-Loop supervised, inference-free. OUT — any LLM summarization; the rewind cadence itself; per-ticket-usage-metrics (sibling ticket, same key).
**Test plan:** unit-test the log parser against captured AR-009 log fixtures (event extraction + attempt/outcome grouping); integration test that a digest round-trips and a resume reads it; verify graceful degradation to flat timeline when boundary markers are absent.
**Completion criteria:** Digester daemon runs under Ground Loop; a mid-build resume reads a ticket-keyed digest carrying the attempt->outcome timeline + current blocker; the log parser passes against captured AR-009 fixtures; the degrade-to-flat-timeline path (no boundary markers) is verified.
body.result: 37-test digester daemon with log_parser (event extraction + flat-timeline degrade + boundary marker detection), digest_store (devlab.build_digest Postgres CRUD), Ground Loop runme plugin (cursor-resumed polling), staged descriptor. Degrades gracefully to flat timeline when boundary markers absent (verified by test). Commit 92723cdf.
body.intention: I intend that a context resuming a build reads a small ticket-keyed digest of attempt->outcome + current blocker, never re-tokenizing raw logs, maintained by an inference-free minion.
